ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Continued To Apr-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Kaller for (Administrator) Julie Goodson-Lawes.

Mr. Kaller reported that they are behind schedule, that there is only a bank account and brokerage account, that they need to complete the inventory and will be filing a waiver of accounting. The Court stated that the Inventory & Appraisal is due and asked when the petition would be filed. Mr. Kaller stated that they would be filed at the same time and that they are waiting for the referee to finalize the inventory & appraisal. The status on close of estate was continued to April 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Jung. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
